changes.reason: Call-wall acceptance produced only one trade, but it was the cleanest profile by MAE and exposure efficiency. Relaxing the DEX volume floor from 1.0B to 750M should build sample without abandoning positive dealer-flow confirmation.
Move from 0.05 to 0.03 to admit moderate forward-DEX continuation states while still requiring positive forward dealer support.
Reduce the call-volume expansion hurdle from 0.10 to 0.05 to test whether sparse sampling is under-routing otherwise valid call-wall acceptance impulses.
The only observed call-wall trade had very low MAE and high MFE, so a modest target ceiling expansion should test upside capture without changing entry routing broadly.

expected_effect: Should increase call_wall_acceptance_long sample count from the current one-trade footprint while preserving valid-0DTE option confirmation. Expected upside is higher net profit and PnL per exposure hour from clean call-wall impulses; risk is wall-chase entries with higher MAE if the relaxed DEX and call-volume thresholds admit weak acceptance.
label: promote
rationale: Use batch_a_call_wall_acceptance_long as the next isolated experiment. Prior fallback/take-profit work is saturated and recently hurt score, while call_wall_acceptance_long is underexplored and showed the best realized efficiency: 1 trade, $91 PnL, 455 PnL/exposure hour, and only -11.7 worst MAE. This is not a global filter and does not let option-confirmed profiles trade on missing or stale 0DTE data.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: call_wall_acceptance_long has only one VALID_0DTE trade, but that trade had $91 PnL, 455 PnL/exposure hour, -11.7 MAE, high setup quality, and strong ADX. This suggests the concept may be under-routed rather than unprofitable.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Call Wall Acceptance Sample Builder
strategy_hypotheses.risk: One-trade evidence can overfit; relaxed acceptance may add low-quality wall-chase entries or steal signals from stronger pullback profiles.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE sessions with positive net DEX, positive forward DEX, and expanding call volume near an upside call wall.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Increase call_wall_acceptance_long to at least 5 trades with positive PnL, PnL per exposure hour above 250, worst MAE better than -100, total net profit at least 98% of run_001, and no degradation in VALID_0DTE performance.

strategy_plan_reference.market_regime_read: The tested window is a strongly favorable long-only, no-stop-loss regime with 105 completed trades, 100% realized win rate, no slow >=12h trades, 0.4% drawdown, and high fast-tr...

new_strategy_ideas.name: 1DTE Pullback Companion
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL/exposure hour improves above 167.94 while total 1DTE PnL remains >= baseline $1298.7 and worst MAE does not worsen beyond -375.7.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Dormant Pin-Avoid Mean-Reversion Discovery
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: New dormant profile produces positive PnL, PnL/exposure hour >150, average MAE below active-profile median, and does not reduce active profile PnL in the same run.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Call Wall Acceptance Sample Builder
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Increase call_wall_acceptance_long to at least 5-8 trades with positive PnL, PnL/exposure hour >250, and worst MAE below -100.
